html:
Exclusive to:

The Silly Monkey Ball is a craftable Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Survival Tab, requires 2 Snakeskin, 2 Rope and a Banana to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. Silly Monkey Balls can be used to distract Prime Apes.

When used, Prime Apes in the area will focus on the Silly Monkey Ball, and will no longer chase the player if they were aggressive, nor will they pick up items in the area until the Silly Monkey Ball is gone.

Trivia

  • The Silly Monkey Ball was introduced in the Hang Ten update.
  • Silly Monkey Ball may be a reference to Super Monkey Ball.
  • The inspection text from Wilson is a reference to Wilson the volleyball, from the 2000 film Cast Away, of whom Wilson himself is named after.

Gallery

  • Silly Monkey Ball as seen in the poster for the Hang Ten update.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"monkeyball"
“I have a strange desire to name it after myself.”
–Wilson
“I bet the monkeys would have a ball with this thing.”
–Willow
“Ha ha! Stupid monkey men.”
–Wolfgang
“It makes me feel less alone. Plus I can throw it.”
–Wendy
“SOURCE OF OBJECTIONABLE MONKEY MIRTH”
–WX-78
“My primate decoy.”
–Wickerbottom
“What're you smiling at?”
–Woodie
“What am I supposed to do with this?”
–Maxwell
“He he. I can see what those simians see in this amusing sphere.”
–Wagstaff
“A bit öf mönkey merriment.”
–Wigfrid
“We've made a friend!”
–Webber
“What's that little dude? You want me to throw you?”
–Walani
“Seems like a waste of a good banana. Cute though.”
–Warly
“This be unsettlin'.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS PLAYTHING O' THE LITTLE UNPIG”
–Wilba
“Hee hee. Fun!”
–Wormwood
“I'm pretty proud of the sewing job on this.”
–Wheeler
The Silly Monkey Ball is a craftable Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Survival Tab, requires 2 Snakeskin, 2 Rope and a Banana to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. Silly Monkey Balls can be used to distract Prime Apes.
When used, Prime Apes in the area will focus on the Silly Monkey Ball, and will no longer chase the player if they were aggressive, nor will they pick up items in the area until the Silly Monkey Ball is gone.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Silly Monkey Ball was introduced in the Hang Ten update.
Silly Monkey Ball may be a reference to Super Monkey Ball.
The inspection text from Wilson is a reference to Wilson the volleyball, from the 2000 film Cast Away, of whom Wilson himself is named after.

The '''Silly Monkey Ball''' is a craftable [[Item]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Survival Tab]], requires 2 [[Snakeskin]], 2 [[Rope]] and a [[Banana]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. Silly Monkey Balls can be used to distract [[Prime Ape]]s.

When used, Prime Apes in the area will focus on the Silly Monkey Ball, and will no longer chase the player if they were aggressive, nor will they pick up items in the area until the Silly Monkey Ball is gone.

=={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Silly Monkey Ball was introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#Version History|Hang Ten]]'' update.
* Silly Monkey Ball may be a reference to [http://supermonkeyball.wikia.com/wiki/Super_Monkey_Ball_Wiki Super Monkey Ball].
* The inspection text from Wilson is a reference to Wilson the volleyball, from the 2000 film Cast Away, of whom Wilson himself is named after.
